1.texto_original: POI sonò il quinto angelo, ed io vidi una stella caduta dal cielo in terra; e ad esso fu data la chiave del pozzo dell’abisso.
1.normal:
Devotional Study of Apocalisse 9:1

"POI sonò il quinto angelo, ed io vidi una stella caduta dal cielo in terra; e ad esso fu data la chiave del pozzo dell’abisso."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

For the modern reader, this verse offers both comfort and challenge. It invites us to trust in Gods sovereign plan while actively living out its principles in daily life.
1.academico:
Exegetical Analysis of Apocalisse 9:1

Philological Analysis

"POI sonò il quinto angelo, ed io vidi una stella caduta dal cielo in terra; e ad esso fu data la chiave del pozzo dell’abisso."

The original language presents significant lexical and syntactic elements. Key terms reveal theological distinctions often lost in translation.

Historical-Critical Context

Source criticism and form criticism illuminate the compositional history. The Sitz im Leben reflects socio-religious dynamics of antiquity.

Theological Implications

This verse contributes to covenant theology, divine sovereignty, human responsibility, and eschatological hope.

Archaeological Evidence

Recent discoveries from the ancient Near East provide material context for interpreting this passage.
1.ninos:
🌟 Amazing Story! 🌈

Hey kids! 🚀 Today we learn something super cool from the Bible! ✨

"POI sonò il quinto angelo, ed io vidi una stella caduta dal cielo in terra; e ad esso fu data la chiave del pozzo dell’abisso."

This verse teaches us something really important about God 💝. He loves us SO much! 🌟

Think about it: just like an artist 🎨 carefully paints every detail, God carefully created everything — including YOU! 😊

Fun Activity: Draw your favorite thing God created! 🖍️🙏❤️

15.normal:
Devotional Study of Apocalisse 9:15

"E furono sciolti que’ quattro angeli, che erano apparecchiati per quell’ora, e giorno, e mese, ed anno; per uccider la terza parte degli uomini."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

For the modern reader, this verse offers both comfort and challenge. It invites us to trust in Gods sovereign plan while actively living out its principles in daily life.
15.academico:
Exegetical Analysis of Apocalisse 9:15

Philological Analysis

"E furono sciolti que’ quattro angeli, che erano apparecchiati per quell’ora, e giorno, e mese, ed anno; per uccider la terza parte degli uomini."

The original language presents significant lexical and syntactic elements. Key terms reveal theological distinctions often lost in translation.

Historical-Critical Context

Source criticism and form criticism illuminate the compositional history. The Sitz im Leben reflects socio-religious dynamics of antiquity.

Theological Implications

This verse contributes to covenant theology, divine sovereignty, human responsibility, and eschatological hope.

Archaeological Evidence

Recent discoveries from the ancient Near East provide material context for interpreting this passage.
15.ninos:
🌟 Amazing Story! 🌈

Hey kids! 🚀 Today we learn something super cool from the Bible! ✨

"E furono sciolti que’ quattro angeli, che erano apparecchiati per quell’ora, e giorno, e mese, ed anno; per uccider la terza parte degli uomini."

This verse teaches us something really important about God 💝. He loves us SO much! 🌟

Think about it: just like an artist 🎨 carefully paints every detail, God carefully created everything — including YOU! 😊

Fun Activity: Draw your favorite thing God created! 🖍️🙏❤️

17.texto_original: Simigliantemente ancora vidi nella visione i cavalli, e quelli che li cavalcavano, i quali aveano degli usberghi di fuoco, di giacinto, e di zolfo; e le teste de’ cavalli erano come teste di leoni; e dalle bocche loro usciva fuoco, e fumo, e zolfo.

19.texto_original: Perciocchè il poter de’ cavalli era nella lor bocca, e nelle lor code; poichè le lor code erano simili a serpenti, avendo delle teste, e con esse danneggiavano.

Devotional Study of Apocalisse 9:19

"Perciocchè il poter de’ cavalli era nella lor bocca, e nelle lor code; poichè le lor code erano simili a serpenti, avendo delle teste, e con esse danneggiavano."

20.texto_original: E il rimanente degli uomini, che non furono uccisi di queste piaghe, non si ravvide ancora delle opere delle lor mani, per non adorare i demoni, e gl’idoli d’oro, e d’argento, e di rame, e di pietra, e di legno, i quali non possono nè vedere, nè udire, nè camminare.
